summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, label, comment, or fix action is planned; low-signal closeout, merge, and fix PRs are disabled by the job frontmatter. Hydrated open PRs are kept independently; items without hydrated live state are blocked for rehydration only.
